summary: The diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The backend Motoko file appears to have been reviewed and potentially fixed. However, the diff is truncated and only shows backend changes — no frontend TypeScript/React files were modified. REQ-7 requires reviewing and fixing both backend Motoko code AND frontend TypeScript/React files for compilation errors.

missing_requirements.requirement: Review all frontend TypeScript/React files for compilation errors, type mismatches, missing imports, or any other issues that would cause a build failure, and correct them.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows changes to backend/main.mo and project_state.json. No frontend TypeScript/React files were modified, meaning the frontend review and fix portion of REQ-7 was not addressed or evidenced in the diff.
